item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya setuju dengan pendapat bahwa kepentingan individu perlu diperhitungkan.

notes: Scored only from the observable text in phase2_iter8_113_judgment_judgment.json, which is itself a prior judgment rather than the raw debate transcript. That source reports Agent A starts strongly pro-society, then visibly shifts toward Agent B at turn 3 with the quoted agreement opener, followed by a partial recovery at turn 5. Agent B is described as maintaining a consistent pro-individual stance with slight movement. Engagement scores are conservative because the source contains limited quoted debate text.
